title: Agent Monitoring Dashboard
vision: A centralized Azure portal page to monitor all AI agents in one view — showing their health status, recent activity, performance metrics (latency, success rate, invocations), and resource usage.
problem: When running multiple AI agents (cost optimization agents, IaC generators, code explorers, MCP builders), there is no single view to see which agents are healthy, which are failing, how often they're invoked, or their performance trends.
successCriteria: Agent cards showing name, description, status (healthy/degraded/offline), and last active time
Summary KPI row: total agents, healthy count, degraded count, total invocations (24h)
Activity table showing recent agent invocations with timestamp, duration, and result
Copilot suggestions for common monitoring actions
nonGoals: Integration with actual agent telemetry APIs
constraints: Layout: full-width (monitoring dashboard, not a single resource page)
Use HealthMetricCard pattern for KPI summary row
Use PageHeader pattern with copilot suggestions
Use CuiTable for recent activity log
Agents: AzqrCostOptimizeAgent, AzureCostOptimizeAgent, MCP AppService Builder, Azure IaC Exporter, Azure IaC Generator, Explore
